placeholderParameters.name: eval.tempo
placeholderParameters.reason: Declared in engine/include/tuning/engine_tuning.hpp and absent from production evaluation consumers.

parameters.name: evaluation.bishop.badHeavyPenalty
parameters.connectivity: Specific bishop-pawn block patterns add this penalty to MG and EG.

parameters.name: evaluation.bishop.badLightPenalty
parameters.connectivity: Specific lighter bishop-pawn block patterns add this penalty to MG and EG.

parameters.name: evaluation.bishopPair.eg
parameters.connectivity: Side with two or more bishops receives this EG bonus before tapering.

parameters.name: evaluation.bishopPair.mg
parameters.connectivity: Side with two or more bishops receives this MG bonus before tapering.

parameters.name: evaluation.endgame.latePhaseMax
parameters.connectivity: Controls whether mop-up and low-material scaling logic is active.

parameters.name: evaluation.endgame.mopUpEgMargin
parameters.connectivity: EG score must exceed this absolute margin before mop-up terms are applied.

parameters.name: evaluation.endgame.mopUpMaterialMargin
parameters.connectivity: Endgame material advantage must exceed this margin before mop-up terms are applied.

parameters.name: evaluation.endgame.mopUpWeights
parameters.connectivity: Mop-up center, edge, corner, and king-distance terms are combined into EG bonus in won low-phase endings.

array.indexing: centerDistanceWeight, edgeDistanceBase, edgePressureWeight, cornerDistanceCap, cornerPressureWeight, kingDistanceBase, kingDistanceWeight

parameters.name: evaluation.endgame.scaleMinorOnlyClearEdge
parameters.connectivity: No-pawn minor-only endings with two-minor difference clamp low-material scale to this numerator.

parameters.name: evaluation.endgame.scaleMinorOnlyNearEqual
parameters.connectivity: No-pawn minor-only endings with minor difference at most one clamp low-material scale to this numerator.

parameters.name: evaluation.endgame.scaleOppositeBishopsLowPawns
parameters.connectivity: Opposite-colored bishop endings with up to six total pawns clamp low-material scale to this numerator.

parameters.name: evaluation.endgame.scaleOppositeBishopsMinPawns
parameters.connectivity: Opposite-colored bishop endings with two or fewer total pawns clamp low-material scale to this numerator.

parameters.name: evaluation.king.attackPressure
parameters.connectivity: Enemy pieces attacking the king zone select this penalty array, which is subtracted from MG evaluation.

array.monotonicity: not currently enforced; future tuning should consider monotone constraints

parameters.name: evaluation.king.shieldMaxPawns
parameters.connectivity: King-zone pawn count is capped before multiplying by the per-pawn shield bonus.

parameters.name: evaluation.king.shieldPerPawnBonus
parameters.connectivity: Capped shield pawn count is multiplied by this bonus and added to MG evaluation.

parameters.name: evaluation.king.uncastledCenterPenalty
parameters.connectivity: King on files c through f receives this MG penalty.

parameters.name: evaluation.king.uncastledLostRightsPenalty
parameters.connectivity: Uncastled king in the center with no castling rights receives this additional MG penalty.

parameters.name: evaluation.material.eg
parameters.connectivity: EG_VALUE[piece] is added to EG_PESTO and also used by endgameMaterialValue for mop-up eligibility.

array.indexing: PieceType order: pawn, knight, bishop, rook, queen, king
array.recommendedFutureRepresentation: piece-indexed integer array with king fixed

parameters.name: evaluation.material.mg
parameters.connectivity: MG_VALUE[piece] is added to MG_PESTO for each piece and accumulated into Board::m_mgScore; static eval and search scores change.

array.indexing: PieceType order: pawn, knight, bishop, rook, queen, king
array.recommendedFutureRepresentation: piece-indexed integer array with king fixed

parameters.name: evaluation.mobility.eg
parameters.connectivity: Per-piece mobility counts are multiplied by this EG array and added to tapered evaluation.

sentinels: pawn and king mobility are not consumed
array.recommendedFutureRepresentation: piece-indexed integer array for knight through queen

parameters.name: evaluation.mobility.mg
parameters.connectivity: Per-piece mobility counts are multiplied by this MG array and added to tapered evaluation.

sentinels: pawn and king mobility are not consumed
array.recommendedFutureRepresentation: piece-indexed integer array for knight through queen

parameters.name: evaluation.pawns.backwardByRank.eg
parameters.connectivity: Backward pawn detection indexes this array by relative rank and subtracts EG penalties.

parameters.name: evaluation.pawns.backwardByRank.mg
parameters.connectivity: Backward pawn detection indexes this array by relative rank and subtracts MG penalties.

parameters.name: evaluation.pawns.candidateByRank.eg
parameters.connectivity: Candidate passer detection indexes this array by relative rank and adds EG bonuses.

parameters.name: evaluation.pawns.candidateByRank.mg
parameters.connectivity: Candidate passer detection indexes this array by relative rank and adds MG bonuses.

parameters.name: evaluation.pawns.connectedByRank.eg
parameters.connectivity: Connected pawns are indexed by relative rank and summed into EG evaluation.

array.indexing: relative rank 0..8; legal chess ranks use 1..8

parameters.name: evaluation.pawns.connectedByRank.mg
parameters.connectivity: Connected pawns are indexed by relative rank and summed into MG evaluation.

array.indexing: relative rank 0..8; legal chess ranks use 1..8

parameters.name: evaluation.pawns.doubledPenalty
parameters.connectivity: Each extra pawn on a file adds this penalty and is subtracted from MG and EG.

parameters.name: evaluation.pawns.islandPenalty.eg
parameters.connectivity: Extra pawn islands multiply this EG penalty and are subtracted before tapering.

parameters.name: evaluation.pawns.islandPenalty.mg
parameters.connectivity: Extra pawn islands multiply this MG penalty and are subtracted before tapering.

parameters.name: evaluation.pawns.isolatedPenalty
parameters.connectivity: Pawns with no adjacent-file friendly pawns add this penalty and are subtracted from MG and EG.

parameters.name: evaluation.pawns.passedBlockedDivisor
parameters.connectivity: If the forward square is enemy-occupied, the passed-pawn bonus is divided by this value.
dataRequirements: blocked and unblocked passed pawn positions

parameters.name: evaluation.pawns.passedCountBonus.eg
parameters.unit: centipawn per passed pawn count difference
parameters.connectivity: Passed-pawn count difference is multiplied by this EG value and added before rank-based passed-pawn bonuses.

parameters.name: evaluation.pawns.passedCountBonus.mg
parameters.unit: centipawn per passed pawn count difference
parameters.connectivity: Passed-pawn count difference is multiplied by this MG value and added before rank-based passed-pawn bonuses.

parameters.name: evaluation.pawns.passedEgMultiplier
parameters.connectivity: Rank-square passed-pawn bonus is multiplied by this value when applied to EG evaluation.

parameters.name: evaluation.pawns.passedRankSquareMultiplier
parameters.connectivity: relativeRank^2 is multiplied by this scalar to produce the base passed-pawn bonus.

parameters.name: evaluation.phase.increments
parameters.connectivity: GAME_PHASE_INC accumulates m_gamePhase and controls MG/EG interpolation in applyBonusTermsAndTaper.

sentinels: pawn and king phase increments are fixed at 0 unless phase model changes

parameters.name: evaluation.pst.egPesto
parameters.connectivity: EG_PESTO[piece][pestoSquare(color, square)] is added to material for each piece in incremental and static evaluation.

array.indexing: piece index then white-oriented A1..H8 square index
sentinels: pawn first and eighth ranks are present but unreachable in legal positions
array.recommendedFutureRepresentation: piece-square table with file symmetry or region basis

parameters.name: evaluation.pst.mgPesto
parameters.connectivity: MG_PESTO[piece][pestoSquare(color, square)] is added to material for each piece in incremental and static evaluation.

array.indexing: piece index then white-oriented A1..H8 square index
sentinels: pawn first and eighth ranks are present but unreachable in legal positions
array.recommendedFutureRepresentation: piece-square table with file symmetry or region basis

parameters.name: evaluation.queen.earlyUndevelopedMinorPenalty
parameters.unit: centipawn penalty per extra undeveloped minor
parameters.connectivity: A queen moved off the starting rank while at least two minors remain undeveloped receives this MG penalty.

parameters.name: evaluation.rook.trappedPenalty
parameters.connectivity: Rooks in corner squares trapped by own king receive this MG penalty.

parameters.name: evaluation.rookActivity.eg
parameters.connectivity: Open-file, semi-open-file, and seventh-rank rook bonuses are added to EG evaluation.

parameters.name: evaluation.rookActivity.mg
parameters.connectivity: Open-file, semi-open-file, and seventh-rank rook bonuses are added to MG evaluation.

parameters.name: evaluation.taper.scale
parameters.connectivity: Low-material scale factor multiplies final tapered score and divides by this denominator.

parameters.name: opening.bookDepth
parameters.connectivity: Opening book is used only while sanHistory().size() is below this value; UCI BookDepth writes it directly.

parameters.name: opening.enabled
parameters.connectivity: UCI OwnBook toggles whether runUciMode consults OpeningBook before launching search.

parameters.name: opening.seed
parameters.connectivity: UCI BookSeed reseeds OpeningBook::m_rng, changing deterministic weighted selection sequence.

parameters.name: opening.selectionMode
parameters.connectivity: Selection mode chooses best, weighted, or top-N weighted behavior for legal book candidates.

parameters.name: opening.selectionTopN
parameters.connectivity: TopNWeighted mode truncates legal sorted candidates to this count before weighted random selection.

parameters.name: search.aspiration.windowCp
parameters.connectivity: Previous iteration score plus/minus this window sets alpha/beta for PV-1 from depth 4 onward; fail high/low triggers full-window re-search.

parameters.name: search.futility.forwardMarginPerDepthCp
parameters.connectivity: Quiet non-check moves at depth <= 3 can be skipped when staticEval + depth*margin <= alpha.

parameters.name: search.futility.reverseMarginPerDepthCp
parameters.connectivity: At non-PV non-check nodes with depth <= 6, staticEval - depth*margin can return early.

parameters.name: search.history.cap
parameters.connectivity: Quiet beta cutoffs add depth^2 history bonus and failed quiets subtract it, both clamped to +/- this cap.

parameters.name: search.lmr.baseScaled100
parameters.connectivity: LMR_TABLE[depth][moveCount] is initialized from base + log(depth)*log(moveCount), then consumed by negamax reductions.

parameters.name: search.nullMove.reduction
parameters.connectivity: Null-move search uses depth - 1 - reduction; beta cutoff changes nodes and tactical behavior.

parameters.name: search.ordering.captureScores
parameters.connectivity: SEE-nonnegative captures receive winning base plus SEE*multiplier plus MVV-LVA; losing captures receive losing base plus SEE*multiplier plus MVV-LVA.

parameters.name: search.ordering.mvvLva
parameters.connectivity: Capture victim/attacker matrix is added to capture ordering score after SEE component.

parameters.name: search.ordering.promotionBase
parameters.connectivity: Promotion moves add this base plus promoted piece value to ordering score.

parameters.name: search.ordering.quietScores
parameters.connectivity: Primary killer, secondary killer, and countermove quiet bonuses are added before history score.

array.recommendedFutureRepresentation: named struct; tune as relative ordering group

parameters.name: search.ordering.ttMoveScore
parameters.connectivity: TT move receives this score in sortMovesByScore and should outrank ordinary ordering terms.

parameters.name: search.quiescence.deltaPruningMarginCp
parameters.connectivity: Captures can be skipped when standPat + capturedValue + this margin < alpha.

parameters.name: search.see.pieceValues
parameters.connectivity: SEE, delta pruning capturedValue, and promotion ordering use these exchange values.

array.recommendedFutureRepresentation: piece-indexed array; dependency on evaluation material scale

parameters.name: search.singular.marginCp
parameters.connectivity: TT score minus this margin sets singular-extension exclusion search beta.

parameters.name: time.criticalLowTimeReserveMs
parameters.connectivity: Panic allocation uses max(1, safeTimeLeft - this reserve).

parameters.name: time.criticalLowTimeThresholdMs
parameters.connectivity: When safeTimeLeft is below this threshold, normal allocation is replaced by panic allocation.

parameters.name: time.expectedMovesBase
parameters.connectivity: Expected moves remaining is max(floor, base - moveNumber) unless movestogo is supplied.

parameters.name: time.expectedMovesFloor
parameters.connectivity: Expected moves remaining is max(floor, base - moveNumber) unless movestogo is supplied.

parameters.name: time.hardStopFraction
parameters.connectivity: Iterative deepening exits after elapsed time exceeds currentHardLimit * 3 / 4.

parameters.name: time.instabilityMultiplierPermille
parameters.connectivity: Unstable score history multiplies allocated_time by 1.3 before hard cap; future model should use fixed-point integer.

parameters.name: time.instabilityThresholdCp
parameters.connectivity: If previous two search scores differ by more than this threshold, allocated time is multiplied.

parameters.name: time.maxClockFractionDenominator
parameters.connectivity: Normal clock allocation is capped at safeTimeLeft divided by this denominator.

parameters.name: time.minimumMoveTimeMs
parameters.connectivity: go movetime and clock allocation clamp to this minimum in normal cases.

parameters.name: time.polling.nodeMask
parameters.connectivity: Search calls checkTime when (nodesSearched & mask) == 0; affects stop latency and overhead.

parameters.name: time.safetyReserveMs
parameters.connectivity: Clock mode subtracts this reserve from remaining time before allocation.

parameters.name: time.softStop.stablePercent
parameters.connectivity: If best move is stable for enough iterations, search may stop after elapsed time exceeds this fraction of hard limit.

parameters.name: time.softStop.unstablePercent
parameters.connectivity: When best move changes, soft stop fraction is set to this higher percent.

excludedGroups.name: eval.tempo
excludedGroups.reason: No production evaluation consumer exists; retaining it would expose a placeholder.

excludedGroups.name: board geometry and masks
excludedGroups.reason: Chess rules and bitboard layout depend on fixed 8x8 geometry.

excludedGroups.name: castling and promotion encodings
excludedGroups.reason: Protocol and legal move generation require fixed meanings.

excludedGroups.name: mate, infinity, and draw scores
excludedGroups.reason: Search correctness and mate-distance comparisons require stable score bands.

excludedGroups.name: Polyglot random keys
excludedGroups.reason: Book lookup integrity depends on standard Polyglot hashing.

excludedGroups.name: transposition table structural masks
excludedGroups.reason: Mask must track TT size as power-of-two storage layout, not strength tuning.

excludedGroups.name: parser and UCI protocol syntax
excludedGroups.reason: External protocol compatibility and validation constraints.

excludedGroups.name: diagnostic counters
excludedGroups.reason: Telemetry values observe behavior and are not configuration inputs.

excludedGroups.name: watchdog and backend safety ceilings
excludedGroups.reason: Operational safety limits should remain runtime safety configuration, not engine-strength tuning.

dependencyGroups.note: Evaluation scale changes pruning margins and SEE/delta assumptions.
Passed-pawn count, rank bonus, EG multiplier, and endgame scaling are tightly coupled.
Large king safety swings affect static-eval pruning safety.
Margins must be validated against evaluation scale and move ordering.
LMR and null move rely on good ordering and tactical guards.
Allocation and stop thresholds jointly determine time safety.
Top-N and seed only matter when book use and selection mode permit random choice.
